block_00: Card chhaviyaan ko asvikrit kar diya gaya
block_01: Durbhaagy se, aapke dvaara submit ki gayi card chhaviyon ko ek vishisht samasya ke kaaran asvikaar kar diya gaya tha. Adhik jaanakaari ke liye kripya humaare
block_04: Hum anurodh karte hain ki aap nimn link ke maadhyam se nayi card chhaviyaan upload karen.
